originalTitle: Apple is reportedly testing a MacBook Neo with more RAM
summary: Following the MacBook Neo's huge popularity so far, Apple is reportedly developing an updated version of its budget laptop with a new processor and more memory, and even has plans to refresh the model with new colors. Following a similar report from analyst Tim Culpan earlier this year, Bloomberg's Mark Gurman says the new Neo […]
content: Following the MacBook Neo’s huge popularity so far, Apple is reportedly developing an updated version of its budget laptop with a new processor and more memory, and even has plans to refresh the model with new colors. Following a similar report from analyst Tim Culpan earlier this year, Bloomberg’s Mark Gurman says the new Neo will run on an A19 Pro processor, which currently powers the iPhone 17 Pro / Pro Max and the iPhone Air, unlike the current laptop’s A18 Pro that was originally in the iPhone 16 Pro. The chip upgrade also means the updated Neo may have more RAM, likely 12GB rather than the original 8GB.  However, ongoing component shortages will almost certainly mean the next Neo costs more than the original did, previewed by Apple raising prices on nearly all of its devices last month.  Another way it could get more expensive to start is the possibility that Apple could discontinue the lowest-priced 256GB version of the Neo.  In addition to rumors of an updated Neo, Gurman also says Apple is planning to release new iMacs, which last got a refresh in 2024, with OLED screens. Other long-rumored updates like the M6 MacBook Pro and OLED touchscreen MacBooks are also reportedly on the way, with the OLED models coming sometime late this year or early next year, as well as a newly redesigned base model 14-inch MacBook Pro with an M7 chip inside for next year.
chineseTitle: 据报道，苹果正在测​​试配备更多 RAM 的 MacBook Neo
chineseSummary: 继 MacBook Neo 迄今为止大受欢迎之后，据报道，苹果正在开发其廉价笔记本电脑的更新版本，配备新的处理器和更多的内存，甚至计划用新的颜色更新该型号。继今年早些时候分析师蒂姆·卡尔潘 (Tim Culpan) 发表类似报告后，彭博社的马克·古尔曼 (Mark Gurman) 表示，新的 Neo [...]
chineseContent: 据报道，继 MacBook Neo 迄今为止大受欢迎之后，苹果正在开发其廉价笔记本电脑的更新版本，配备新的处理器和更多的内存，甚至计划用新的颜色更新该型号。继今年早些时候分析师 Tim Culpan 发布类似报告后，彭博社的 Mark Gurman 表示，新款 Neo 将运行在 A19 Pro 处理器上，该处理器目前为 iPhone 17 Pro / Pro Max 和 iPhone Air 提供动力，与当前笔记本电脑的 A18 Pro 处理器不同，该处理器最初是在 iPhone 16 Pro 中使用的。芯片升级还意味着更新后的 Neo 可能拥有更多 RAM，可能是 12GB，而不是原来的 8GB。  然而，持续的零部件短缺几乎肯定意味着下一代 Neo 的成本将高于原来的价格，苹果上个月就提高了几乎所有设备的价格。  另一种可能导致起步成本更高的方式是苹果可能停止推出价格最低的 256GB Neo 版本。  除了有关 Neo 更新的传言外，Gurman 还表示，苹果还计划发布配备 OLED 屏幕的新款 iMac，后者上次更新是在 2024 年。据报道，其他传闻已久的更新，如 M6 MacBook Pro 和 OLED 触摸屏 MacBook 也即将推出，OLED 型号将在今年晚些时候或明年初推出，而新设计的基础型号 14 英寸 MacBook Pro 将于明年推出，内置 M7 芯片。
whyItMatters: 这条信息属于 AI 与科技趋势信号，适合用于观察工具选型、产品机会、开发者关注点和技术路线变化。
